# Suitcase Carry

- Domain: `kettlebells`
- Session Duration: `~20-25 min`
- Frequency: `2-3x/week`
- Format: `carry`
- Equipment: `single kettlebell`

## Summary

Loaded carry performed one arm at a time in a suitcase hold, alternating sides periodically.

## Work

- Carry a single kettlebell for one mile.
- Use a suitcase hold.
- Switch arms periodically.
- Try not to put the bell down.
- If needed, perform a single-arm deadlift to switch arms.

## Notes

- Use a kettlebell around 20-30% of body weight.
- Keep posture tall and controlled throughout the carry.
